mapper.sql: SELECT ID, CLOSE_SAIL_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, BERTH_ID, BERTH_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_DIS_CLOSE_SAIL_SHIP
mapper.select:
SELECT ID, CLOSE_SAIL_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, BERTH_ID, BERTH_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_DIS_CLOSE_SAIL_SHIP
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_DIS_CLOSE_SAIL_SHIP( ID, CLOSE_SAIL_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, BERTH_ID, BERTH_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{closeSailId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{berthId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{berthName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_DIS_CLOSE_SAIL_SHIP SET ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CLOSE_SAIL_ID = #{closeSailId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, SHIPVOYAGE_ID = #{shipvoyageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, BERTH_ID = #{berthId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, BERTH_NAME = #{berthName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT BERTH_ID, BERTH_NAME FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE WHERE ID = #{shipId, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT SHIPVOYAGE_ID AS ID FROM T_DIS_CLOSE_SAIL_SHIP
CLOSE_SAIL_ID = #{closeSailId}
